channel.title: Home Automation on Sara Zan
channel.description: Recent content in Home Automation on Sara Zan

item.title: Brekeke
item.description: With the rise of more and more powerful LLMs, I am experimenting with different ways to interact with them in ways that don’t necessarily involve a laptop, a keyboard or a screen. I codenamed all of these experiments “Brekeke”, the sound frogs make in Hungarian (don’t ask why). The focus of these experiments is mostly small home automation tasks and run on a swarm of Raspberry Pis. See the series here.
